title: selaginella spinulosovena
intro: Selaginella spinulosovena is a species of the Selaginella genus, a type of small, non-vascular, and spore-producing plant commonly known as a resurrection fern. Traditionally, it has been used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Selaginella spinulosovena include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including high blood pressure, arthritis, and respiratory issues.
